config.script:
'------------------------------- definicja storage, load save ------------------- class cafd_row private m_strSymbol private m_strNazwa private m_strWyrazenie private m_strJednostka private m_curTmpValue private m_nComputed '0 - not computed, 1 - computing, 2 - computed
public sub class_initialize() m_strSymbol = "" m_strNazwa = "" m_strWyrazenie = "" m_strJednostka = ""
reset end sub
public property get symbol() symbol = m_strSymbol end property
public property let symbol(strSymbol) m_strSymbol = strSymbol end property
public property get nazwa() nazwa = m_strNazwa end property
public property let nazwa(strNazwa) m_strNazwa = strNazwa end property
public property get wyrazenie wyrazenie = m_strWyrazenie end property
public property let wyrazenie(strWyrazenie) m_strWyrazenie = strWyrazenie end property
public property get jednostka() jednostka = m_strJednostka end property
public property let jednostka(strJednostka) m_strJednostka = strJednostka end property
public property get computed() computed = (m_nComputed = 2) end property
public sub mark_computed m_nComputed = 2 end sub
public property get computing() computing = (m_nComputed = 1) end property
public sub mark_computing m_nComputed = 1 end sub
public property get value value = m_curTmpValue end property
public property let value(curValue) m_curTmpValue = curValue end property
public sub reset() m_nComputed = 0 m_curTmpValue = ccur(0.0) end sub end class
function save_data(byref strName,byref pNAVOArray,byref pDestStream) dim pExporter : set pExporter = doc_.system.activex("navoexpimp.exportpackage") pDestStream.write "<?xml version=""1.0"" encoding=""windows-1250""?>" + vbCrLf pExporter.ostream pDestStream
dim pMsg : set pMsg = pExporter.newmsg
pMsg.header("") = strName pMsg.header.save dim iter for iter = 0 to pNAVOArray.Count() - 1 dim pExpObj: set pExpObj = pMsg.newobj(1,1+iter) pExpObj("symbol") = pNAVOArray.Value(iter).symbol pExpObj("nazwa") = pNAVOArray.Value(iter).nazwa pExpObj("wyrazenie") = pNAVOArray.Value(iter).wyrazenie '--- DB ver 3 --- pExpObj("jednostka") = pNAVOArray.Value(iter).jednostka pExpObj.save next
pMsg.save pExporter.save end function
class cimportparser private m_strName private m_pNAVOArray
public sub init(byref pNAVOArray) set m_pNAVOArray = pNAVOArray end sub
public sub done(byref strName) strName = m_strName end sub
public sub OnMessageBegin(byref pMsgObj,byref bBreak) m_strName = pMsgObj.header("") m_pNAVOArray.RemoveAll end sub
public sub OnMessageEnd(pMsgObj,byref bBreak) end sub
public sub OnObject(pObject,byref bBreak) dim pAFD : set pAFD = new_afd_row() pAFD.symbol = pObject("symbol") pAFD.nazwa = pObject("nazwa") pAFD.wyrazenie = pObject("wyrazenie") '--- DB ver 3 --- if pObject.isfield("jednostka") then pAFD.jednostka = pObject("jednostka") end if m_pNAVOArray.Add(pAFD) end sub
end class
function load_data(byref strName,byref pNAVOArray,byref pSrcStream) dim pImporter : set pImporter = doc_.system.activex("navoexpimp.importpackage") dim pImportParser : set pImportParser = new cimportparser pImportParser.init pNAVOArray
pImporter.sink = pImportParser pImporter.istream pSrcStream pImporter.go pImportParser.done strName end function
function new_afd_row() set new_afd_row = new cafd_row end function
function prepare_err_msg(byval strCode) prepare_err_msg = "Wystąpił błąd skryptu " + cstr(err.Number) + ", opis:" + err.Description + _ " dla wyrażenia [" + strCode + "]" end function
'------------------------------- obliczenia ------------------------ class cafec 'analizy finansowe execution context private m_pArrayAFD private m_pKontoInfoMan private m_dDateStart private m_dDateEnd private m_idKwalifikator private m_pDictRelatedCAFEC
public m_bSaldoWOkresie
private sub class_initialize() set m_pArrayAFD = nothing set m_pKontoInfoMan = nothing set m_pDictRelatedCAFEC = doc_.system.activex("Scripting.Dictionary") m_bSaldoWOkresie = false end sub private sub class_terminate() 'TODO set m_pArrayAFD = nothing set m_pKontoInfoMan = nothing set m_pDictRelatedCAFEC = nothing end sub
private sub compute_zois dim pPM : set pPM = doc_.getmodule(60159) set m_pKontoInfoMan = pPM.prepare_zois(m_dDateStart,m_dDateEnd,nothing,nothing,nothing,m_idKwalifikator) end sub
private function findkonto(byval strSymbol) dim idKonto : idKonto = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5KONTO,"strSymbol='" + _ trans_.afc.convert.DoubleApostrophe(strSymbol) + "'") if idKonto <= 0 then err.raise 7000,"Nieznane konto: " + strSymbol end if findkonto = idKonto end function
public sub init(byref pArrayAFD,dDateStart,dDateEnd,byval idKwalifikator) set m_pArrayAFD = pArrayAFD m_dDateStart = dDateStart m_dDateEnd = dDateEnd m_idKwalifikator = idKwalifikator
'reset values dim iter for iter = 0 to pArrayAFD.Count - 1 pArrayAFD.Value(iter).reset next m_bSaldoWOkresie = false end sub public function bown(byval strSymbol) if m_pKontoInfoMan is nothing then compute_zois end if dim pKontoInfo : set pKontoInfo = m_pKontoInfoMan.kontoinfo(findkonto(strSymbol)) bown = pKontoInfo. m_curBO_Wn end function
public function boma(byval strSymbol) if m_pKontoInfoMan is nothing then compute_zois end if dim pKontoInfo : set pKontoInfo = m_pKontoInfoMan.kontoinfo(findkonto(strSymbol)) boma = pKontoInfo. m_curBO_Ma end function public function saldown(byval strSymbol) if m_pKontoInfoMan is nothing then compute_zois end if dim pKontoInfo : set pKontoInfo = m_pKontoInfoMan.kontoinfo(findkonto(strSymbol)) if m_bSaldoWOkresie then saldown = pKontoInfo.m_curSalO_Wn else saldown = pKontoInfo.m_curSalN_Wn end if end function
public function saldoma(byval strSymbol) if m_pKontoInfoMan is nothing then compute_zois end if dim pKontoInfo : set pKontoInfo = m_pKontoInfoMan.kontoinfo(findkonto(strSymbol)) if m_bSaldoWOkresie then saldoma = pKontoInfo.m_curSalO_Ma else saldoma = pKontoInfo.m_curSalN_Ma end if end function
public function obrotywn(byval strSymbol) if m_pKontoInfoMan is nothing then compute_zois end if dim pKontoInfo : set pKontoInfo = m_pKontoInfoMan.kontoinfo(findkonto(strSymbol)) obrotywn = pKontoInfo.m_curObrO_Wn end function
public function obrotyma(byval strSymbol) if m_pKontoInfoMan is nothing then compute_zois end if dim pKontoInfo : set pKontoInfo = m_pKontoInfoMan.kontoinfo(findkonto(strSymbol)) obrotyma = pKontoInfo.m_curObrO_Ma end function
private function compute_one(byval strWyrazenie) compute_one = ccur(0.0)
if trim(strWyrazenie) = "" then exit function end if
dim strCode
strCode = "function wynik(byref pKontekst)" + vbCrLf + _ " with pKontekst"+ vbCrLf + _ "wynik =_ " + vbCrLf + _ strWyrazenie + vbCrLf + _ " end with" + vbCrLf + _ "end function" + vbCrLf
on error resume next
execute strCode
if err.Number <> 0 then trans_.message 6521, 1, "Przygotowanie wyrażenia do obliczeń nieudane." + _ prepare_err_msg(strCode) exit function end if
compute_one = wynik(Me)
if err.Number <> 0 then trans_.message 6522,1, "Obliczenie wyrażenia nieudane." + _ prepare_err_msg(strCode) exit function end if
on error goto 0
end function
public function iif(varCond,varTrue,varFalse) if (varCond) then iif = varTrue else iif = varFalse end if end function
public function div(varNom,varDenom) if ccur(varDenom) = ccur(0.0) then div = ccur(0.0) else div = ccur(varNom / varDenom) end if end function
public function sym(byval strSymbol) dim iter for iter = 0 to m_pArrayAFD.Count - 1 if m_pArrayAFD.Value(iter).symbol = strSymbol then with m_pArrayAFD.Value(iter) if not .computed then if .computing then err.raise 7000,"Obliczanie wyników","Rekursja w obliczeniach symbolu: " + strSymbol end if .mark_computing 'obliczamy .value = compute_one(.wyrazenie) .mark_computed end if sym = .value end with exit function end if next err.raise 7000,"Obliczanie wyników","Nieznany symbol: " + strSymbol end function
public function zest(byval strNazwa) set zest = nothing if not m_pDictRelatedCAFEC.exists(strNazwa) then dim idAnalFinans : idAnalFinans = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5ANALFINANS,"strNazwa='" + _ trans_.afc.convert.DoubleApostrophe(strNazwa) + "'")
if idAnalFinans > 0 then dim pAnalFinans : set pAnalFinans = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5ANALFINANS,idAnalFinans) if not pAnalFinans.fXML.isempty() then dim pArrAFRows : set pArrAFRows = doc_.afc.new_navoarray() dim strDummy load_data strDummy,pArrAFRows,pAnalFinans.fXML dim pCAFEC : set pCAFEC = new cafec pCAFEC.init pArrAFRows,m_dDateStart,m_dDateEnd,m_idKwalifikator
m_pDictRelatedCAFEC.Add strNazwa,pCAFEC set zest = pCAFEC end if end if else set zest = m_pDictRelatedCAFEC.Item(strNazwa) end if end function
public sub compute_all 'forces all computations dim iter for iter = 0 to m_pArrayAFD.Count - 1 with m_pArrayAFD.Value(iter) .mark_computing .value = compute_one(.wyrazenie) .mark_computed end with next end sub end class
sub oblicz_afd(byref pNAVOArray,dDateStart,dDateEnd,byval idKwalifikator) oblicz_afd_ex pNAVOArray,dDateStart,dDateEnd,idKwalifikator,false end sub
sub oblicz_afd_ex(byref pNAVOArray,dDateStart,dDateEnd,byval idKwalifikator,byval bSaldoWOkresie) dim pCAFEC : set pCAFEC = new cafec pCAFEC.init pNAVOArray,dDateStart,dDateEnd,idKwalifikator pCAFEC.m_bSaldoWOkresie = bSaldoWOkresie pCAFEC.compute_all end sub
